videos.description:
Is an endless stream of annoying tax cards and some targeted hate the answer to Vivi Cauldron in Standard? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/much-abrew-death-and-taxes-in-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7287613#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/1W7RO
